name: Framing - Empty Payload Rejection
description: Verifies that packets with zero-length payload are rejected. The reference implementation (Packet::readFrom) checks 'if (i >= len) return false' after reading header+transport+path_len+path, requiring at least 1 byte of payload.

vectors.description: FLOOD packet with no payload bytes (just header + path_len)
vectors.notes: 2 bytes total: header 0x0D + path_len 0x00. No payload bytes remain. readFrom returns false because i(2) >= len(2).

vectors.description: TRANSPORT_FLOOD with no payload (header + transport + path_len only)
vectors.notes: 6 bytes: header(1) + transport(4) + path_len(1). i=6, len=6, so i>=len = true.

vectors.description: FLOOD packet with path but no payload
vectors.notes: 4 bytes: header(1) + path_len(1) + path(2). i=4, len=4.
